subject: FW: Jeffrey Epstein & CHurch Lab annual update
body:
From: George Church [mailto:gmc@harvard.edu] 
Sent: Monday, February 25, 2008 11:13 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Cc: 'Yveta Masarova'; 'Mayra Mollinedo'
Subject: RE: Jeffrey Epstein & CHurch Lab annual update

 

I spoke with Jeffrey on Feb 14 and he suggested that I write up three
pages of about how the COUQ money has been used in 2007 and will be used
in 2008.   So I've attached that description to this email.  Please let
me know if it arrives intact.

Thanks,
--George 

________________________________

From: Lesley Groff [mailto:lesley@nysgllc.com] 
Sent: Thursday, February 14, 2008 1:09 PM
To: gmc@harvard.edu
Subject: Jeffrey Epstein

 

Hello George.  Could you please give Jeffrey a call...he would like to
speak with you.

 

212 750 9895

 

Thanks, Lesley

 

*** George M. Church**************************************************
 Professor of Genetics, Harvard Medical School
     MIT Health Sciences & Technology
     Senior Associate of the Broad Inst. of Harvard & MIT
     Director, DOE MIT-Harvard Genomes to Life Center,
     Director, NIH Center for Excellence in Genomic Science
Mail: NRB room 238, 77 Avenue Louis Pasteur, Boston, MA 02115 USA
Administrative assistance   http://arep.med.harvard.edu/
(617) 432-1278 Cindy Vallaro (cvallaro@genetics.med.harvard.edu)
(617) 432-5742 Mayra Mollinedo (mmollinedo@genetics.med.harvard.edu)
(617) 432-7562 direct line & voice mail.   Fax: (617) 432-6513
**********************************************************************
